items.title: Trump made more than $1bn from crypto in first year back in office
items.dek: The president earned millions more from real estate, Trump-themed Bibles, watches and other items.
items.body: The president earned millions more from real estate, Trump-themed Bibles, watches and other items.

items.title: Anthropic says US lifts export ban on its advanced AI tools
items.dek: Fable and Mythos were abruptly suspended in June over concerns that they could be used by hackers.

items.title: Afghan Taliban launch strikes on border with Pakistan as tensions escalate
items.dek: Pakistan's military says it shot down four rudimentary drones and will respond to any further provocation.
items.body: Pakistan's military says it shot down four rudimentary drones and will respond to any further provocation.
